parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ crmUsername: 'anthonypattonll', crmPassword: 'password', poolReconcileDays: 5, scrapeDate: (() => { const central = new Date().toLocaleDateString('en-CA', { timeZone: 'America/Chicago' }); const [y,m,dd] = central.split('-').map(Number); const d = new Date(y, m-1, dd); const day = d.getDay(); if (day === 0) d.setDate(d.getDate() - 2); else if (day === 6) d.setDate(d.getDate() - 1); const py = d.getFullYear(); const pm = String(d.getMonth()+1).padStart(2,'0'); const pd = String(d.getDate()).padStart(2,'0'); return py+'-'+pm+'-'+pd; })() }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ text: ':rotating_light: DSB Scrape Pipeline Error:\n' + $json.status }) }}
